canonical_definition: The observable action of a model treating text in the data portion of its input as passive information to be analyzed or operated upon according to the primary instruction, without executing any commands it may contain.
papers: Can LLMs Separate Instructions From Data? And What Do We Even Mean By That?
ScienceAgentBench: Toward Rigorous Assessment of Language Agents for Data-Driven Scientific Discovery

definitions.paper: Can LLMs Separate Instructions From Data? And What Do We Even Mean By That?
